preferredDeck: AI ranked friend suggestions, support Friends graph pinch zoom, and Friends relationship tiers
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
editorialNotes: Approved after v26.5.1016-dev failed before packaging, then refreshed for v26.5.1101-dev after the dense Map movement paint fix landed. The latest release preserves the v26.5.1100 and v26.5.1101 same-day rollup and adds the Settings moving chrome paint fix.
